properties.notes:
Property with granny flat built for elderly parent under formal written granny flat arrangement. No rent charged.

**Timeline:**
- 1 Apr 2010 to 10 Oct 2024: Main residence (14.53 years)
- 15 Jun 2015: Granny flat constructed ($95,000)
- Elderly parent lived in granny flat under written agreement (no rent)

**Key Rules:**
- Granny flat arrangement under written agreement
- No rent charged to parent
- Property can still qualify for full main residence exemption
- Granny flat is ancillary to main dwelling
- **NO CGT PAYABLE** - Full main residence exemption applies

**Expected Result:**
- NO CGT PAYABLE - Granny flat arrangement doesn't affect main residence exemption
- Total capital gain (before exemption): $443,450
- Full exemption applies

**ATO Rules Applied:**
- Section 118-110 ITAA 1997 (Main Residence Exemption)
- TD 2004/26 (Granny Flat Arrangements)
- Formal written granny flat arrangement doesn't constitute income-producing use
- Property remains eligible for full main residence exemption

user_query: Property at 88 Elm Street, Indooroopilly QLD 4068, with granny flat for elderly parent under formal arrangement

additional_info.expected_outcome: NO CGT PAYABLE - Granny flat arrangement doesn't affect main residence exemption (TD 2004/26)
